label: 2023 La Vuelta Ciclista a Espana Stage 13

extraction.one_line_summary: VINGEGAARD attacked with 8km to go on Tourmalet, KUSS marked all moves and finished second, JUMBO-VISMA took podium sweep and top-3 GC.
tactical_patterns: VINGEGAARD attacked 8km from summit with AYUSO shadowing, revealing JUMBO's willingness to let Tour winner chase stage glory.
KUSS acted as tactical policeman marking ROGLIC's rivals rather than chasing teammate VINGEGAARD, prioritizing GC control over stage win.
ROGLIC held powder dry while KUSS policed attacks from LANDA and BUJAK, showing dual-leader structure with KUSS protected.
EVENEPOEL dropped on first climb Aubisque despite not being ill, suggesting altitude or heat vulnerability distinct from standard bad day.

rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: negative: Lost major time on Aubisque before key climbs, suggesting metabolic issue rather than illness requiring tactical reassessment.
rider_signals.KUSS Sepp: positive: Looked freshest after policing all attacks, then finished second only 29 seconds down, revealing unexpected GC-winning form.
rider_signals.VINGEGAARD Jonas: positive: Won from 50-second gap built 8km out, demonstrating Tour form carried over despite supporting KUSS overall.
rider_signals.AYUSO Juan: positive: Took KOM jersey by surviving with leaders while accumulating points, showing stage-hunting tactics within GC defense.
rider_signals.SOLER Marc: negative: Started second on GC, tumbled significantly despite no reported incident, indicating sudden form collapse.
rider_signals.LANDA Mikel: negative: Attacked but edged off by KUSS's pace changes, confirming third-tier status behind JUMBO trio.
